chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 83 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1248/2021 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.1249/2021 30.10.2025 Mr. Talha Abbasi, advocate for the applicant On the last date following order was passed: “16.10.2025 Malik Naeem Iqbal advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, which is taken on record. He states that identical matters have already been reserved by this court, therefore, may be just and proper to defer the matter. To come up on 30.10.2025” Today learned counsel files copy of judgment dated 21.10.2025 passed in SSTRA No.349 of 2019 and connected matters, same is taken on record. Learned counsel states that the questions raised in this reference application have already been determined vide the aforementioned judgment against the department. In view hereof and in mutatis mutandis application of reasoning given in the judgment cited above the questions pleaded for determination in this reference application are decided against the applicant department and this reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
